description: User dwells on the browser tab area while the page is blank.
frame_description: The screen is dark/blank with the cursor positioned in the tab bar area.

description: Possible click on a browser tab or link to initiate navigation to the Flight Centre website.
The browser navigates to the Flight Centre homepage.
frame_description: The page transitions from blank to showing the Flight Centre header and loading placeholders.

description: User dwells on the center of the page while content and promotional banners load.
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel.
frame_description: The cursor remains stationary over the main content area as the 'Tropical Islands Sale' banner becomes visible.

description: The flight search widget appears on the screen over the promotional banner.
frame_description: A blue 'Search flights' button and date selection fields appear in a white box on the page.
